nodes.title: Video Size
widgets_values:
Width & height settings must be divisible by 32 + 1. 
Frame count must be divisible by 8 + 1. 


Running with invalid parameters **will not cause errors**. Instead, the flow will silently choose the closest valid parameters.

nodes.title: Prompting LTX-2
widgets_values:
## LTX-2 Prompting Tips
1. **Core Actions**: Describe events and actions as they occur over time  
2. **Audio**: Describe sounds and dialogue needed for the scene  
3. **Reference Image**: Do not repeat details already present  
4. **Consistency**: Avoid instructions that do not match the reference image, as this will degrade results

nodes.title: LoRA
widgets_values:
# Using LoRAs
**Ctrl + B to enable**

For the camera LoRA we recommend setting strength = 1

You can use LTX [Ready to use camera LoRAs](https://huggingface.co/collections/Lightricks/ltx-2)




Use a second LoRa only when the details are important in the LoRa. 

## Training
We have made available a full trainer to help you to train your own LoRA. You can [find it here](https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2).

nodes.title: Positive Prompt
widgets_values: Woman slowly drinking cocktail in the bar. Camera keeps woman in focus.

nodes.title: Model Links
widgets_values:
## Model Links

**LTX-2 Model Weights**

- [ltx-2-19b-distilled-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2/resolve/main/ltx-2-19b-distilled-fp8.safetensors)
- [ ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors ](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2/resolve/main/ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors)

**Text Encoder**
- [gemma_3_12B_it_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/GitMylo/LTX-2-comfy_gemma_fp8_e4m3fn/resolve/main/gemma_3_12B_it_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors)

- [ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_dev_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/resolve/main/text_encoders/ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_dev_bf16.safetensors)




**Model Storage Location**

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      ├── gemma_3_12B_it_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors
│   │      ├── ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_dev_bf16.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 checkpoints/
│   │      └── ltx-2-19b-distilled-fp8.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 latent_upscale_models/ 
           └── ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors
```
**Assets**
- [distilled image](https://github.com/Lightricks/ComfyUI-LTXVideo/blob/master/example_workflows/assets/distilled%20image.png)


### Find more ComfyUI Workflows on the diffused forum: [https://diffused.to](https://diffused.to/Forum-ComfyUI-Workflows)
